ddls:
CREATE TABLE "residents" (
  "resident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resident */,
  "given_name" TEXT /* Given name of the resident */,
  "surname" TEXT /* Surname of the resident */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the resident */,
  "soc_sec_id" INTEGER /* Social security ID of the resident */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the resident */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the resident */,
  "email_verified" INTEGER /* Indicates if the resident's email is verified */,
  "phone_verified" INTEGER /* Indicates if the resident's phone number is verified */,
  "date_of_death" TEXT /* Date of death of the resident */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the resident's record is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "addresses" (
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each address */,
  "resident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resident the address belongs to */,
  "street_number" INTEGER /* Street number of the address */,
  "address_1" TEXT /* First line of the address */,
  "address_2" TEXT /* Second line of the address */,
  "suburb" TEXT /* Suburb of the address */,
  "postcode" INTEGER /* Postcode of the address */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the address */,
  "address_type" TEXT /* Type of address (e.g., home, work) */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the address */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the address */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Indicates if the address is the current address of the resident */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the address record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the address record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_addresses_resident_id FOREIGN KEY ("resident_id") REFERENCES residents ("resident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "address_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each address history entry */,
  "resident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resident the address history belongs to */,
  "address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the address */,
  "move_in_date" TEXT /* Date the resident moved into the address */,
  "move_out_date" TEXT /* Date the resident moved out of the address */,
  "reason_for_move" TEXT /* Reason for the move */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the address history record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the address history record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_address_history_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("address_id") REFERENCES addresses ("address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_address_history_resident_id FOREIGN KEY ("resident_id") REFERENCES residents ("resident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contacts" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact entry */,
  "resident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resident the contact belongs to */,
  "contact_type" TEXT /* Type of contact (e.g., phone, email) */,
  "contact_value" TEXT /* Value of the contact (e.g., phone number, email address) */,
  "contact_type_description" TEXT /* Description of the contact type */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Indicates if the contact is the primary contact */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the contact record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the contact record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contacts_resident_id FOREIGN KEY ("resident_id") REFERENCES residents ("resident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship entry */,
  "resident_id_1" INTEGER /* ID of the first resident in the relationship */,
  "resident_id_2" INTEGER /* ID of the second resident in the relationship */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., spouse, child) */,
  "relationship_type_description" TEXT /* Description of the relationship type */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the relationship started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the relationship ended */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the relationship record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the relationship record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_relationships_resident_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("resident_id_1") REFERENCES residents ("resident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_relationships_resident_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("resident_id_2") REFERENCES residents ("resident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "residence_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each residence status entry */,
  "resident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resident the status belongs to */,
  "status_type" TEXT /* Type of residence status (e.g., citizen, permanent resident) */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date the status was granted or updated */,
  "status_description" TEXT /* Description of the residence status */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date of the status */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the residence status record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the residence status record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_residence_status_resident_id FOREIGN KEY ("resident_id") REFERENCES residents ("resident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "trail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit trail entry */,
  "resident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resident the audit trail belongs to */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., update, delete) */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the change */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the change was made */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the audit trail record was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_resident_id FOREIGN KEY ("resident_id") REFERENCES residents ("resident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the log belongs to */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the user accessed the database */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time the user accessed the database */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the database */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the log entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "backup_history" (
  "backup_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each backup entry */,
  "backup_date" TEXT /* Date the backup was made */,
  "backup_time" TEXT /* Time the backup was made */,
  "backup_type" TEXT /* Type of backup (e.g., full, incremental) */,
  "backup_size" TEXT /* Size of the backup */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who initiated the backup */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Indicates if the backup was successful */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the backup entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("backup_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_backup_history_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting entry */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the setting */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the setting was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the setting was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)
